name: Lizard Skins
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Rice Krispies, Cheerios or Corn Flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat peanut butter with marshmallows in a large saucepan over low heat until melted.
2. Add green food coloring and mix in.
3. Pour into cereal and stir quickly.
4. Spray an 8-inch pan with Pam cooking spray.
5. Pour contents into the pan.
6. Allow to cool in the fridge.
7. Cut into long, thin strips, about 1 inch x 4 inches.
8. Cut each raisin in half and stick on one end of each strip to make the lizard's eyes.
